'''Rindao''' was a drab training station in the days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], close to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. When the Empire arrived to take over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the local populace had not resisted outright, and so avoided any significant persecution by the new regime. An exception to this was when an Imperial officer heard an [[Tionne Solusar's grandmother|old woman]] singing songs of the glorious days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. The old woman was swiftly executed by [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]] for her perceived slur on the glory of the Empire. However, her legacy was continued through her granddaughter, [[Tionne Solusar]], who saved her [[Double viol/Legends|double viol]] and fled the planet.<ref name="FS">{{JournalCite|15|Firestorm (short story)}}</ref> She later became a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] herself.<ref name="CF">''[[Champions of the Force]]''</ref>
